title: filago germanica proles eriocephala
intro: Filago germanica proles eriocephala, commonly known as the rough hawk's beard, is a subspecies of the Filago germanica plant, which belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Filago germanica proles eriocephala include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against infections, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
